description_long: This is a modular wooden shelving unit composed of three separate rectangular sections, each featuring open horizontal shelves. The wood has a medium brown finish with a visible grain pattern, giving it a natural and sturdy appearance. The top section has four evenly spaced shelves, while the two lower sections each have two shelves, providing ample storage or display space. The back and sides are solid panels, and there are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels. The overall design is simple, functional, and suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas. The open shelving makes it easy to access or organize items, and the flat tops can also serve as additional surfaces for placing objects.
description: A modular, medium-brown wooden shelving unit with open shelves and a simple, functional design. It consists of three rectangular sections with visible wood grain and no doors or handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing all open shelves and the modular arrangement of the three sections.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the solid side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panels and the separation between the three sections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and solid construction.
